heroHeadline: SAF Repels RSF Assault on Wadi al-Hout; MSF Condemns Rabak & Al-Jabalain Hospital Strikes; Sudan-Libya Security Talks
heroSubtitle: SAF forces repelled a large-scale RSF ground assault on Wadi al-Hout in North Kordofan on April 6, consolidating SAF's territorial gains since the Bara recapture; MSF issued a formal condemnation on April 4 of RSF drone strikes on Al-Jabalain Hospital (10 killed, 7 medical staff) and a concurrent attack on the Rabak medical supply depot in White Nile State; Sudan and Libya's Government of National Unity held military security talks in Tripoli on April 5 focused on border security and countering UAE-facilitated RSF supply routes; RSF-SPLM-N artillery continued shelling Dilling, South Kordofan on April 5 killing 5 and wounding 33 civilians; Sudan's 2026 humanitarian appeal remains 84% underfunded at $2.9B requested
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, Darfur24, AFP, Anadolu Agency, The National, UN News, UN Security Council, IOM, Washington Post, MadaMasr, Xinhua, Asharq Al-Awsat
